name: MeridianLink, Inc.
description: MeridianLink, Inc. is a leading provider of cloud-based software solutions for financial institutions, including banks, credit unions, and fintech companies. The company offers a comprehensive digital lending platform that integrates account opening, loan origination, mortgage processing, collections, and reporting into a single, intuitive ecosystem. By leveraging shared data and advanced technology, MeridianLink helps its clients streamline their operations, improve the customer experience, and drive growth. Headquartered in the United States, the company serves a diverse range of financial organizations, enabling them to digitize and automate complex lending and account opening workflows efficiently.
